title: Repository Purpose, Risk Profile, and Definition of Done
description: Design quality gates for a new repository according to its actual failure costs. Learners cumulatively produce a repository engineering contract through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Define users, runtime, data sensitivity, deployment, ownership, and expected lifetime.
Rank correctness, security, accessibility, performance, compatibility, and maintenance risks.
Define machine-verifiable and human-reviewed completion criteria.
